rule.description: Detect Suspicious LoL commands - New Scheduled Tasks: "$(sysmon.commandLine)"
Detect Suspicious LoL commands - New Scheduled Tasks: $(processCommandLine)
Legit New Scheduled Tasks
Legit New Scheduled Tasks
Legit Parent Command Line New Scheduled Tasks
Legit New Scheduled Tasks
Deletion of Scheduled Tasks
Deletion of Scheduled Tasks
Legit disabling Windows Customer Experience Improvement Program
Legit disabling Windows Customer Experience Improvement Program

rule.field: C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Update\\|\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Update\\GoogleUpdate|\\Common Files\\Microsoft Shared\\ClickToRun\\Updates\\|\\Local\\WhatsApp\\Update|com.squirrel.WhatsApp.WhatsApp|C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Common Files\\Java\\Java Update|\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Update\\|--update|\\Mozilla Maintenance Service\\update|\s/update
rule.description: Normal appearance of Squirrel/Update in command line

rule.field: C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Update\\|\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Update\\GoogleUpdate|\\Common Files\\Microsoft Shared\\ClickToRun\\Updates\\|\\Local\\WhatsApp\\Update|com.squirrel.WhatsApp.WhatsApp|C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Common Files\\Java\\Java Update|\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Update\\|--update|\\Mozilla Maintenance Service\\update|\s/update
